case_title: LA DUE, MICHAEL G. VS AON RISK SERVICES OF NO. CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LA DUE, MICHAEL G. AS TO DEFENDANT AON RISK SERVICES OF NO. CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO AON RISK SERVICES OF NORTHERN CA. RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA DUE, MICHAEL G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AON RISK SERVICES OF NO. CALIFORNIA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AON RISK SERVICES OF NO. CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-10-1998, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA DUE, MICHAEL G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AON RISK SERVICES OF NO. CALIFORNIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
